## Summary

Describe the focused user-visible or documentation change.

## Verification

- [ ] Extension flow checks pass.
- [ ] Provider registry checks pass.
- [ ] Relevant Engine or Native Messaging checks pass.
- [ ] Manual Chrome steps are documented when needed.
- [ ] No API keys, cookies, generated media, models, logs, or machine-specific paths are included.
- [ ] Permission, privacy, dependency, and third-party notice changes are documented.
- [ ] Packaged releases include a version increase and `CHANGELOG.md` entry.
